final:
// // This module is designed to read a 4-bit temperature input and output a 1-bit alert signal.
// The alert signal will be deactivated when the temperature exceeds a certain threshold (e.g., 10 degrees).
// The design includes a clock input to trigger the reading of the temperature input, and a reset input to reset the alert signal.
module temperature_sensor(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [3:0] temperature,
    output reg alert
);
    parameter THRESHOLD = 4'b1010; // Threshold set to 10 degrees

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            alert <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            if (temperature > THRESHOLD) begin
                alert <= 1'b1; // Activate alert if temperature exceeds threshold
            end else begin
                alert <= 1'b0; // Deactivate alert otherwise
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
